Title: Hybrid: Mutated True Kin
Description:
This mod introduces new features to True Kin:
- Can choose mutations at character creation
- Gain MP on level up
- Can buy mutations
- Eater's Nectar gives additional +1 MP
- Skulk Injector gives Burrowing Claws
- Glimmer of Truth achievement disabled.

[u]Compatibility[/u]
This mod is [b]incompatible[/b] with Hybrid: Cybernetic Mutants. Otherwise works with other hybrid mods, if they intend to have true kin tonic effects.
[i]Skulk[/i] will automatically disable itself if it detects conflicts to the same type. Nectar is non-blocking and won't disable itself. Tonic mods should be fully compatible.

[u]Technical[/u]
Eater's Nectar is updated using object blueprints for the tool tip and a non-blocking prefix injection in [i]XRL.World.Parts.Nectar_Tonic_Applicator.FireEvent()[/i]. Skulk Injector is updated using object blueprints for the tool tip and a blocking prefix injection in [i]XRL.World.Effects.Skulk_Tonic.Apply()[/i] for the effect and a postfix to [i]XRL.World.Effects.Skulk_Tonic.GetDetails()[/i] for the description. Mutant features are added using [i]Genotypes.xml[/i].
Tags: Genotypes, mutations, Mutants, Becoming, true kin, Mutant, human, humans
